title: Marketplace Manager - Dunzo - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Dunzo - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo family as a Marketplace Manager in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
